title: 4 Rolls Blue Masking Tape, 50m x 24mm Painters Tape Paper Tape Painting Tape Decorators Tape Heat Resistant for Painting Work Renovations DIY Crafts
features: 【Blue Masking Tape】There are 4 rolls of blue masking tape in the package, suitable for daily and industrial occasions indoors and outdoors. The high-visibility blue color makes it easy for you to do your work.
【Size】Each roll of painting tape is 50m/55yd long and 24mm/0.9in wide. The painting tape is small and light, and you can carry it with you.
【Features】The blue painter's tape is resistant to high temperatures (80℃-100℃) and is waterproof. You can easily remove it within 14 days without leaving any glue.

【Medium Adhesiveness】Blue tape has a medium adhesive strength and does not come off easily. It can be stuck on most clean, smooth and dry surfaces such as glass, tiles, marble, wooden boards and metal. (Our painter's tape is not suitable for rough surfaces)

【Usage】Paper tape can be used for color separation, renovation and spray painting work and paint will not penetrate the painting tape. Painter's tape provides targeted masking to give your work a clean edge.
